# PERF-013 negative: reusable time.Timer with Stop+Reset
lang: go
file: PERF-013-safe.go
---
package sample

import "time"

func PollUntilReady() bool {
	timer := time.NewTimer(100 * time.Millisecond)
	defer timer.Stop()
	for i := 0; i < 1000; i++ {
		if !timer.Stop() {
			select {
			case <-timer.C:
			default:
			}
		}
		timer.Reset(100 * time.Millisecond)
		<-timer.C
		if ready() {
			return true
		}
	}
	return false
}

func ready() bool { return false }
